content.text:
<user_query>

Review toolbox file changes for host: Huh8.remote_kernel.fuyao / remote.kernel.fuyo (Fuyao cloud training kernel, deploy/sweep scripts and related skills).

Changed files:
- Modified: rules/concise-agent-summaries.mdc, scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh, skills-cursor/create-rule/SKILL.md, skills-cursor/create-skill/SKILL.md, skills-cursor/create-subagent/SKILL.md, skills-cursor/migrate-to-skills/SKILL.md, skills-cursor/update-cursor-settings/SKILL.md
- Deleted: skills-cursor/shell/SKILL.md, skills/hp-sweep-orchestrator/SKILL.md

Output: decision (apply/skip/prompt) and brief rationale.
</user_query>
Reviewing changed toolbox files and their diffs for the Fuyao host.
Having gathered context, producing the review output:

```yaml
agent: RemotePolicyReviewer
host: Huh8.remote_kernel.fuyao
host_role: remote FUYAO training kernel; deploy/sweep orchestration target
environment_constraints:
  - SSH target for deploy-fuyao and sweep-fuyao; /root/motion_rl
  - Cursor may connect remotely; toolbox rules/skills apply when connected
  - Dispatcher normally runs from local/desktop; can run on Fuyao in edge cases
compatible: yes
decision: apply
compatibility_reason: All changes are host-agnostic; rules and skills-cursor skills are safe; dispatcher changes (RESUME/CHECKPOINT_PATH) are additive; deleted skills are superseded.
findings:
  - severity: low
    file: scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh
    reason: Dispatcher is usually run from local/desktop; syncing to Fuyao is harmless and supports running sweeps from Fuyao if needed.
  - severity: low
    file: skills-cursor/create-rule, create-skill, create-subagent, migrate-to-skills, update-cursor-settings
    reason: Low relevance on a training kernel but safe; update-cursor-settings uses Linux paths compatible with Fuyao.
  - severity: low
    file: skills-cursor/shell/SKILL.md (deleted)
    reason: Shell skill removed; no remaining references.
  - severity: low
    file: skills/hp-sweep-orchestrator/SKILL.md (deleted)
    reason: Superseded by sweep-fuyao; deploy-fuyao and sweep-fuyao cover the workflow.
required_changes: []
confidence: 90
```
